き、緊急連絡です！
キャンプシップ周囲にダーカーの反応！
異常重力源に引き寄せられています！

テレプールの転送座標にノイズを確認！
不測の事態に注意して

E-emergency! Falspawn detected around the
Gateway Ship! The ship it's being pulled in
by a strange gravitational force!

A disturbance was confirmed in the
Telepool transmission coordinates!
Be ready for the unexpected while
you carry out your mission!
